'''Minkring''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Shelsha sector/Legends|Shelsha sector]]. By [[0 ABY/Legends|0.5 ABY]] it was home to one of the only two remaining [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Imperial Army/Legends|army]] [[Garrison/Legends|garrisons]] in the sector (the other being located on [[Chaastern 4]]).

{{Planet-stub}}
